hints: Use level order traversal (BFS) to process nodes level by level.
For each level, collect all node values in a list.
The rightmost node at each level is the last element in that level's list.
Use a delimiter (like null) to separate different levels in the queue.
After collecting all levels, extract the last element from each level to get the right view.
Alternatively, you can modify BFS to only track the rightmost node at each level.
